description: You are an entrepreneur and master mechanic opening an independent bicycle sales and repair shop in a converted commercial space. The building shell is open and all previous residential furniture has been stripped. Draft a complete floor plan that includes a retail showroom, a repair workshop, a parts storage room, and a private staff breakroom/restroom. Divide the open shell into these four distinct functional zones using interior partition walls and connecting doors, labeling each zone clearly. Furnish the Retail Showroom with at least six display shelves/cabinets, a checkout desk, one chair, and four bicycles (or additional shelves if bicycles are unavailable). Furnish the Repair Workshop with at least three workbenches and four tool storage units. Furnish the Breakroom/Restroom with a sofa or lounge chair, one appliance, a toilet, and a sink. The completed plan must contain at least 30 total furniture items. Save the layout to /home/ga/Documents/bike_shop.sh3d.
